title: 2 High-Yield Dividend Stocks I Can't Wait to Buy in 2023
text: I'm preparing for more discounted buying opportunities in the new year.

title: Camden Property Trust: A 3.4% Yield For 2023 And Beyond
text: Camden Property currently pays out a well-covered 3.4% dividend yield. The REIT is shielded from rising Fed fund rates, with nearly 94% of its debt being fixed.

title: See a Recession in 2023? Stock Up on These 3 Ultra-Safe Dividend Stocks.
text: These dividend stocks should easily withstand a recession.

title: The case for investing in REITs despite the Blackstone news
text: Blackstone Inc (NYSE: BX), on Friday, limited withdrawals from its property fund after fears related to the health of the commercial real estate market fuelled redemptions. Still, Jim Lebenthal of Cerity Partners is not giving up on REITs.

title: Camden Property Trust Announces Fourth Quarter 2022 Dividend
text: HOUSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--The Board of Trust Managers of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) declared a fourth quarter cash dividend of $0.94 per share to holders of record as of December 16, 2022 of its Common Shares of Beneficial Interest. The dividend is to be paid on January 17, 2023.

title: It's Over: The REIT Market Is Collapsing (Debunked)
text: REITs are dropping more day after day due to rising interest rates. Investors fear that the profitability and asset values will collapse.
